case_title: SCHWARTZ, ALLAN VS CAPITAL ONE SERVICES, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE SERVICES, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $3,533.35 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,555.35, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. MS.
